title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: How much time do you spend on your phone each day?
Do you prefer to shop online or in person? Why?
How has technology changed the way you communicate with family and friends?
Do you think everyone should know how to use basic computer skills?
What app or website do you find most useful in everyday life?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think people share too much personal information online?
How do you feel about the idea of having fewer digital devices in your life?
Do you think technology brings people closer together or pushes them apart?
